name: Exotel
description: Exotel — Cloud telephony platform in India for call center, IVR, SMS, and WhatsApp business messaging.

seo.title: Exotel — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: Exotel: Exotel — Cloud telephony platform in India for call center, IVR, SMS, and WhatsApp business messaging.

when_to_use: IVR-based call center for Indian customer support
Cloud telephony for OTP delivery in India
WhatsApp Business integration for Indian enterprises
Virtual number API for masking personal numbers in apps
SMS notifications for logistics and delivery tracking

pros: Strong cloud telephony footprint across India and SEA
IVR, call center and WhatsApp in one platform
Good uptime and local telco relationships
Usable self-serve for SMBs, enterprise options too
cons: Outside India and SEA, coverage thins quickly
API docs can feel fragmented across products
Some legacy UI inconsistencies between modules
review.verdict: India/SEA-centric cloud telephony with a credible WhatsApp story — solid regional play, weaker globally.
review.best_for: Indian and SEA businesses needing IVR, call center and WhatsApp together
review.not_for: Global-first messaging products or US/EU-only deployments
